text: Discuss new and upcoming Identities or E.G.O in the [Release History](/release-history) page.
Upload a profile picture in the [Edit Profile](/edit-profile) page!
Don't like how something on the site works? Check out the [Site Customization](/site-customization) page. It lets you customize things like the homepage links or how filters are selected.
You can leave reviews on Identities or E.G.Os if you want to share your thoughts about them. You can also check out other managers' reviews and 'bump' them if you found them useful.

The [Community Rankings](/rankings) Page has multiple options for searching or filtering. Make sure to toggle 'Use Global Rankings' if you want it to retain overall rankings. Otherwise, it'll only show the ranking for the filtered items.
The [Community Rankings](/rankings) Page lets you rank things by individual criteria instead of the overall score.

Don't take the [Community Rankings](/rankings) Page too seriously especially when some things don't have a lot of ratings. Many ratings will be jokes or other nonserious ones. Try checking the Reviewers tab for popular reviewers who are more likely to have useful reviews (assuming people bump useful reviews).
Like the builds or md plans of a manager? You can follow them to get notifications whenever they publish something new. Click the bell icon near their username on their profile or posts.
Some Collections may allow submissions from other users. Try submitting builds or md plans if you want to see them in the collection. The owner will decide whether they want to include them or not.
Trying to find identities or E.G.Os with a specific effect? Try out 'Advanced Compare Mode' in the [Identities](/identities) or [E.G.Os](/egos) pages.
Trying to sort or filter identities or E.G.Os with specific resists or sin costs? Try out 'Advanced Compare Mode' in the [Identities](/identities) or [E.G.Os](/egos) pages.
If you need to see the differences between uptie/threadspin levels, the individual identity/E.G.O pages have a compare mode when you select the uptie.
Most identities and E.G.Os have alternative names you can type for easier filtering. Try typing 'Kodya' in the identities page for example.
If you need to quickly check the stats, skills, or passives of an identity or E.G.O while viewing or editing a build, try using the 'Display Type' button instead of opening their pages.
Most text boxes on the site support Markdown (for styling) and Tokens (for linking or referencing things). Try experimenting with them if you haven't tried them yet.

Tokens have an autocomplete system available when you're typing in the text box. Try typing `{identity:` or `{status:`. They also have shortcuts like `{id:` and `{st:`. Check the tokens guide for more details.

Unlike other tokens, the gifticons token type allows you to put multiple things in one token. For example `{gifticons:9001:9002:...` will put those gifts into a single row. Putting them in separate tokens will create multiple lines instead.

The 'additional details' button when editing a team build lets you add more information for each sinner. Remember that everything is optional. If it's not important, you don't need to set everyone to max level and uptie. Most people will assume that that's the case.
Most encounters in the [Encounters](/encounters) Page have sections for builds. You can have your build listed there if you use the tag on the page.
Many tools on the site have a number input with +/- buttons. You can click on the number and type a new value, especially if the numbers are far.

If you're trying to figure out teams for new identities that aren't in the game or site yet. The [Team Solver](/team-solver) lets you disable sinners from being used. You can disable the sinner with the identity and just reduce the sinners per status and active sinners by 1 to find teams.

The [Company](/company) Page in your profile lets you select the identities and E.G.Os you own. You can then use this info when filtering builds and blacklisting on some tools. It will also show up in your profile if you want to link it to anyone else.
Know a meme commonly used in the community? You can upload them as stickers in [Community Assets](/community-assets) so you can use them anywhere on the site.
Proud of a Reflectrial or Railway clear? You can upload you clear record along with screenshots in the [Encounters](/encounters) page. See how your clear stacks up against others in the community.
